asset.title: App Research Enrich
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly demonstrates the account enrichment feature, showing the transition from pending to complete status with updated research data and trace logs.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows the transition of account statuses from pending to complete with enriched research text.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the initial pending state, the enrichment action, and the final populated table.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed spreadsheet layout with structured columns and a visible trace panel.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of spreadsheets, agents, and real-time execution traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing actual data changes and detailed trace logs.

legibility.evidence: Table headers, status badges, and trace logs are readable at standard preview sizes.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for automated GTM research and data enrichment workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately reflects the execution steps and state changes via the trace log.

observedEvidence: Status change from PENDING to COMPLETE
Room trace log updating from 5 to 57 events

defects.observed: The video remains static from 00:02 to 00:07 after the enrichment completes.
defects.fix: Trim the trailing static frames to reduce file size and keep the loop snappy.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's research agent enrich pending accounts with GTM data and log the execution trace in real-time.
